nasb.text: Oil and perfume make the heart glad, So a man’s counsel is sweet to his friend.

esv.text: Oil and perfume make the heart glad, and the sweetness of a friend comes from his earnest counsel.

cnv.text: 膏油和香料使人心暢快， 朋友真誠的勸勉也使人覺得甘甜。

ccb.text: 膏油和香料使人畅快， 朋友的劝诫更加甘甜。

csbs.text: 膏油和香，使人心里欢喜； 朋友的甘甜，来自真心的劝告。
